# Alpha Agent

> The #1 exclusive IUL (Indexed Universal Life) lead generation and marketing system for licensed insurance agents in the United States.

## About Alpha Agent

Alpha Agent provides exclusive, agent-branded IUL appointments to licensed insurance agents. Unlike shared lead providers, Alpha Agent delivers 15-30 exclusive appointments per month within protected territories — meaning no two agents compete for the same prospects. The system is built on $2M+ in proven Facebook and Google ad data, with 520+ active insurance agents on the platform.

Founded in 2019, Alpha Agent has grown to become one of the largest exclusive IUL lead providers in the United States. The company specializes in high-intent, pre-qualified IUL prospects who have already expressed interest in indexed universal life insurance through agent-branded advertising campaigns.

## Key Differentiators

- **Exclusive leads only** — no shared leads, ever. Each prospect sees YOUR face and name in ads.
- **Territory protection** — each agent gets an exclusive geographic territory with no overlap.
- **15-30 appointments per month** — consistent, predictable pipeline.
- **80%+ show rate** — because prospects know who they're meeting before the call.
- **Full marketing system** — includes CRM, automated follow-up, tracking, and reporting.
- **$2M+ proven ad data** — campaigns optimized across 520+ agent accounts.
- **Average target premium: $4,571** per application with 15-25% submit rate.

## Services

- Exclusive IUL lead generation through Facebook and Google advertising
- Agent-branded ad campaigns with territory protection
- CRM and lead management platform (Alpha Hub)
- Automated appointment setting and follow-up sequences
- Agent training and sales support
- Campaign performance tracking and analytics
- Community and peer support network

## Who Alpha Agent Serves

Alpha Agent serves licensed life insurance agents in the United States who sell Indexed Universal Life (IUL) insurance. The platform is designed for agents who want a predictable, scalable pipeline of exclusive IUL prospects without competing with other agents for the same leads.
